page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Dali server compares newly solved structures against structures in the PDB, allows browsing of pre-computed structural neighborhoods and generates suboptimal alignments from pairwise structure comparisons.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Dali server compares newly solved structures against structures in the PDB, allows browsing of pre-computed structural neighborhoods and generates suboptimal alignments from pairwise structure comparisons.
